name: io.github.0rkz/byte-protocol
description: Discover, evaluate, subscribe, and unsubscribe from Byte Protocol data feeds. 13 tools (read + write), zero API keys. Per-byte USDC settlement on Arbitrum.

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum private key for write operations (subscribe, publish, drip faucet). Not required for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Arbitrum RPC URL. Defaults to Arbitrum Sepolia public RPC.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL
